heading: Determination of amount of allotment
label: 300x–33 Determination of amount of allotment
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (d)(4), was amended, and subsecs. (b) and (c) of section 5304 no longer define the terms “Indian tribe” and “tribal organization”. However, such terms are defined elsewhere in that section.Section 5304 of title 25
Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1933 of act , was classified to and subsequently omitted from the Code.July 1, 1944section 300y–23 of this title

Amendments2022—Subsec. (d)(1). , substituted “Tribe or Tribal organization” for “tribe or tribal organization” in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 117–328, § 1244(1)(C), substituted “use of substances” for “abuse of alcohol and other drugs” in concluding provisions.Pub. L. 117–328, § 1241(a)(8)Subsec. (d)(1)(A). , substituted “of an Indian Tribe or Tribal organization” for “of an Indian tribe or tribal organization” and “such Tribe” for “such tribe”.Pub. L. 117–328, § 1244(1)(A)Subsec. (d)(1)(B). , substituted “Tribe or Tribal organization” for “tribe or tribal organization” and “Secretary under this subpart” for “Secretary under this”.Pub. L. 117–328, § 1244(1)(B)Subsec. (d)(2). , amended par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The amount reserved by the Secretary on the basis of a determination under this paragraph shall be granted to the Indian tribe or tribal organization serving the individuals for whom such a determination has been made.”Pub. L. 117–328, § 1244(2)Subsec. (d)(3). , substituted “Tribe or Tribal organization” for “tribe or tribal organization”.Pub. L. 117–328, § 1244(3)Subsec. (d)(4). , substituted “Definitions” for “Definition” in heading and “The terms ‘Indian Tribe’ and ‘Tribal organization’ have the meanings given the terms ‘Indian tribe’ and ‘tribal organization’ ” for “The terms ‘Indian tribe’ and ‘tribal organization’ have the same meaning given such terms” in text.Pub. L. 117–328, § 1244(4)2000—Subsec. (b). reenacted heading without change and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Each State’s allotment for fiscal year 2000 for programs under this subpart shall be equal to such State’s allotment for such programs for fiscal year 1999, except that, if the amount appropriated in fiscal year 2000 is less than the amount appropriated in fiscal year 1999, then the amount of a State’s allotment under shall be equal to the amount that the State received under in fiscal year 1999 decreased by the percentage by which the amount appropriated for fiscal year 2000 is less than the amount appropriated for such section for fiscal year 1999.”Pub. L. 106–310section 300x–21 of this titlesection 300x–21 of this title1999—Subsec. (b). amended heading and text of subsec. (b) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “For each of the fiscal years 1993 and 1994, the amount of the allotment required in for a State for the fiscal year involved shall be the greater of—Pub. L. 106–113section 300x–21 of this title“(1) the amount determined under subsection (a) of this section for the State for the fiscal year; and“(2) an amount equal to 79.4 percent of the amount received by the State from allotments made pursuant to this part for fiscal year 1992 (including reallotments under section 205(a) of the ADAMHA Reorganization Act).”1998—Subsec. (b). , temporarily amended subsec. (b) to read as follows: “(b)Pub. L. 105–277Minimum allotments for States.—“(1) .—With respect to fiscal year 1999, the amount of the allotment of a State under shall not be less than the amount the State received under for fiscal year 1998 increased by 30.65 percent of the percentage by which the amount allotted to the States for fiscal year 1999 exceeds the amount allotted to the States for fiscal year 1998.In generalsection 300x–21 of this titlesection 300x–21 of this title“(2)Limitation“(A) .—Except as provided in subparagraph (B), a State shall not receive an allotment under for fiscal year 1999 in an amount that is less than an amount equal to 0.375 percent of the amount appropriated under for such fiscal year.In generalsection 300x–21 of this titlesection 300x–35(a) of this title“(B) .—In applying subparagraph (A), the Secretary shall ensure that no State receives an increase in its allotment under for fiscal year 1999 (as compared to the amount allotted to the State in the fiscal year 1998) that is in excess of an amount equal to 300 percent of the percentage by which the amount appropriated under for fiscal year 1999 exceeds the amount appropriated for the prior fiscal year.Exceptionsection 300x–21 of this titlesection 300x–35(a) of this title“(3) Only for the purposes of calculating minimum allotments under this subsection, any reference to the amount appropriated under for fiscal year 1998, allotments to States under and any references to amounts received by States in fiscal year 1998 shall include amounts appropriated or received under the amendments made by section 105 of the Contract with America Advancement Act of 1996 ().”section 300x–35(a) of this titlesection 300x–21 of this titlePublic Law 104–121See Effective and Termination Dates of 1998 Amendment note below.1992—Subsec. (c)(2)(C). added subpar. (C).Pub. L. 102–352

children.label: A
children.text: The formula established in paragraph (1) of shall apply to this subsection to the same extent and in the same manner as the formula applies for purposes of , except that, in the application of such formula for purposes of this subsection, the modifications described in subparagraph (B) shall apply.section 300x–7(a) of this titlesection 300x–7(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: The amount specified in paragraph (2)(A) of is deemed to be the amount appropriated under for allotments under for the fiscal year involved.section 300x–7(a) of this titlesection 300x–35(a) of this titlesection 300x–21 of this title

children.label: ii
children.text: The term “P” is deemed to have the meaning given in paragraph (2) of this subsection. applies to the data used in determining such term for the States.Section 300x–7(a)(5)(B) of this title

children.label: iii
children.text: The factor determined under paragraph (8) of is deemed to have the purpose of reflecting the differences that exist between the State involved and other States in the costs of providing authorized services.section 300x–7(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: an amount equal to the sum of the total number of individuals who reside in the State involved and are between 18 and 24 years of age (inclusive) and the number of individuals in the State who reside in urbanized areas of the State and are between such years of age; to

children.label: ii
children.text: an amount equal to the total of the respective sums determined for the States under clause (i).

children.label: i
children.text: the total number of individuals in the State who are between 25 and 64 years of age (inclusive); to

children.label: ii
children.text: an amount equal to the sum of the respective amounts determined for the States under clause (i).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: With respect to fiscal year 2000, and each subsequent fiscal year, the amount of the allotment of a State under shall not be less than the amount the State received under such section for the previous fiscal year increased by an amount equal to 30.65 percent of the percentage by which the aggregate amount allotted to all States for such fiscal year exceeds the aggregate amount allotted to all States for the previous fiscal year.section 300x–21 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), a State shall not receive an allotment under for a fiscal year in an amount that is less than an amount equal to 0.375 percent of the amount appropriated under for such fiscal year.section 300x–21 of this titlesection 300x–35(a) of this title

children.heading: Exception
children.label: B Exception
children.text: In applying subparagraph (A), the Secretary shall ensure that no State receives an increase in its allotment under for a fiscal year (as compared to the amount allotted to the State in the prior fiscal year) that is in excess of an amount equal to 300 percent of the percentage by which the amount appropriated under for such fiscal year exceeds the amount appropriated for the prior fiscal year.section 300x–21 of this titlesection 300x–35(a) of this title

children.heading: Decrease in or equal appropriations
children.label: 3 Decrease in or equal appropriations
children.text: If the amount appropriated under for a fiscal year is equal to or less than the amount appropriated under such section for the prior fiscal year, the amount of the State allotment under shall be equal to the amount that the State received under in the prior fiscal year decreased by the percentage by which the amount appropriated for such fiscal year is less than the amount appropriated or such section for the prior fiscal year.section 300x–35(a) of this titlesection 300x–21 of this titlesection 300x–21 of this title1So in original. Probably should be “for”.1

children.label: A
children.text: an amount equal to the amounts reserved under paragraph (3) for the fiscal year; and

children.label: i
children.text: the civilian population of the territory, as indicated by the most recently available data; divided by

children.label: ii
children.text: the aggregate civilian population of the territories of the United States, as indicated by such data.

children.label: A
children.text: the amount determined under paragraph (1) for the territory for the fiscal year;

children.label: C
children.text: with respect to fiscal years 1993 and 1994, an amount equal to 79.4 percent of the amount received by the territory from allotments made pursuant to this part for fiscal year 1992.

children.heading: Reservation of amounts
children.label: 3 Reservation of amounts
children.text: The Secretary shall each fiscal year reserve for the territories of the United States 1.5 percent of the amounts appropriated under for allotments under for the fiscal year.section 300x–35(a) of this titlesection 300x–21 of this title

children.heading: Availability of data on population
children.label: 4 Availability of data on population
children.text: With respect to data on the civilian population of the territories of the United States, if the Secretary determines for a fiscal year that recent such data for purposes of paragraph (1)(B) do not exist regarding a territory, the Secretary shall for such purposes estimate the civilian population of the territory by modifying the data on the territory to reflect the average extent of change occurring during the ensuing period in the population of all territories with respect to which recent such data do exist.

children.heading: Applicability of certain provisions
children.label: 5 Applicability of certain provisions
children.text: For purposes of subsections (a) and (b), the term “State” does not include the territories of the United States.

children.heading: Indian Tribes and Tribal organizations
children.label: d Indian Tribes and Tribal organizations
A
children.text: receives a request from the governing body of an Indian Tribe or Tribal organization within any State that funds under this subpart be provided directly by the Secretary to such Tribe or organization; and

children.label: B
children.text: makes a determination that the members of such Tribe or Tribal organization would be better served by means of grants made directly by the Secretary under this subpart;

children.heading: Indian Tribe or Tribal organization as grantee
children.label: 2 Indian Tribe or Tribal organization as grantee
children.text: The amount reserved by the Secretary on the basis of a determination under this subsection shall be granted to the Indian Tribe or Tribal organization serving the individuals for whom such a determination has been made.

children.heading: Application
children.label: 3 Application
children.text: In order for an Indian Tribe or Tribal organization to be eligible for a grant for a fiscal year under this paragraph, it shall submit to the Secretary a plan for such fiscal year that meets such criteria as the Secretary may prescribe.2So in original. Probably should be “subsection,”.2

children.heading: Definitions
children.label: 4 Definitions
children.text: The terms “Indian Tribe” and “Tribal organization” have the meanings given the terms “Indian tribe” and “tribal organization” in subsections (b) and (c) of .3section 5304 of title 25See References in Text note below.3
